title: Add sign up option for user authentication

requirements.text: Add a visible sign up option in the authentication flow that allows new users to create an account using Internet Identity
acceptanceCriteria: A sign up button or link is visible to unauthenticated users
The sign up option clearly indicates it creates a new account
Clicking sign up initiates the Internet Identity authentication flow
After successful sign up, the user is authenticated and can access protected features

requirements.text: Update the AuthButton component to differentiate between sign in and sign up actions, or add a dedicated sign up button in prominent locations like the HomePage and ResultsPage
acceptanceCriteria: Sign up option is clearly distinguishable from sign in
Sign up is accessible from key pages where authentication is relevant
The UI clearly communicates the difference between signing in (existing user) and signing up (new user)

constraints: Must use Internet Identity for authentication

Do not edit immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
